name: Do AI answer engines care how old my content is, or can evergreen articles still perform well?
description: Evergreen articles can perform well, but AI answer engines pay close attention to freshness for time-sensitive topics. Keep key pages visibly dated and updated,

mainEntity.name: Do AI answer engines care how old my content is, or can evergreen articles still perform well?

acceptedAnswer.text:
AI answer engines do favor **fresh, well-dated examples and stats**, especially in fast-moving topics like software or marketing.

Stale content can still be cited, but fresher, clearly updated pages are more attractive sources when answers reference time-sensitive facts.

Key factors:
- Visible publish and update dates on articles and guides
- Regularly refreshed examples, screenshots, and feature descriptions
- Removal or updating of outdated claims and deprecated features
- Versioning for major process or product changes

Set a cadence to revisit priority pages every 3–6 months, updating claims, data, and examples.

This helps AI systems trust your content when users ask “latest” or “2026” style questions.
acceptedAnswer.description: Evergreen articles can perform well, but AI answer engines pay close attention to freshness for time-sensitive topics. Keep key pages visibly dated and updated, refresh examples and stats regularly, and prune outdated claims so AI can confidently treat your content as current.
